claim_limit: Real market data evidence demonstrates that the Financial Agent Evidence OS can verify claim-governed strategy evidence on sealed ETF data. It does not establish live trading readiness, future returns, or market dominance.
distribution_policy: Public repository includes manifest and sample only; full provider-derived ETF CSV snapshots are local/private artifacts unless separately licensed.
non_claims: No return guarantee or future performance claim.
No broker integration, order routing, or execution-readiness claim.
No universal market, strategy, or external-framework dominance claim.
No claim that real-market backtests are live or forward performance.
